nasb.text: Then the Lord sent Nathan to David. And he came to him and said, “There were two men in one city, the one rich and the other poor.

esv.text: And the Lord sent Nathan to David. He came to him and said to him, “There were two men in a certain city, the one rich and the other poor.

cnv.text: 耶和華差派拿單去見大衛。於是拿單來到大衛那裡，對他說：“在一座城裡有兩個人，一個富有，一個貧窮。

ccb.text: 耶和华派拿单先知去见大卫。拿单对大卫说：“一座城里有两个人，一个富有，一个贫穷。
